description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in modern urban attire, featuring a thick, padded jacket with a high collar and visible seam details. He wears fitted pants and high-top sneakers, giving him a casual yet stylish appearance suitable for city environments. The figure has a neatly groomed beard and short hair, and sports dark sunglasses, adding to his contemporary look. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and the jacket appears to have functional pockets and a zipper. The overall build is athletic, with realistic body proportions and subtle clothing folds. The materials and textures suggest a combination of synthetic fabrics and rubber for the clothing and footwear.
description: A modern adult male in a padded jacket, fitted pants, and high-top sneakers, accessorized with sunglasses and a beard, exuding a stylish urban vibe.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared jacket, sunglasses, beard, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the jacket's thickness, profile of the face, and layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket with seam and strap details, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the jacket's profile and the figure's stance.
attribute_clothing_type: padded urban jacket, fitted pants, high-collar, casual streetwear style, sunglasses accessory
